title: Mo.Blend Template Library Catalog (index.json)
description: Canonical schema for the flattened template library catalog served at {registryBaseUrl}/index.json. Generated by MoBlend_Lib CI (or scripts/build_index.py). Consumed by the broker GET /api/v1/templates and all gallery clients. Authoritative copy also lives in MoBlend_Lib/schemas/catalog-v1.schema.json.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when index.json was last built.

base_url.description: Absolute URL prefix for resolving relative artifact paths in entries. Typically the raw Git CDN root or lib.moblend.dev origin.

template_id.description: Stable kebab-case id; matches manifest template_id.

category.description: Registry category slug, e.g. lower-thirds, alerts, transitions, demo.

version.description: Template content version (SemVer). Clients compare against installed_templates.catalog_version to skip re-download.

preview_url.description: Absolute URL to .webp preview (animated preferred; static acceptable for bootstrap).

download_url.description: Absolute URL to the .mo.blend binary. Go InstallTemplate streams this URL.

manifest_url.description: Optional absolute URL to extracted .manifest.json for offline inspection.

parameters.description: Parameter summary for gallery and MCP list_templates (id, type, label only — not full manifest).
